title: Top 5 Claude Cowork Tips I Wish I Knew from Day One
summary: Jeff Su presents five best practices for using Claude Cowork based on three months of experience running his business on the platform. The tips cover keeping CLAUDE.md lean, structuring MEMORY.md, archiving outdated content, migrating Claude Projects to Cowork workstations, and distinguishing when to use skills versus workstations.
